task_description: Implement Option D for GTCRN dual-channel: separate the neural network (encoder/decoder) from STFT/WPE/IVA, export only the neural core to ONNX, implement WPE beamforming in C++, and remove LibTorch dependency. Target: ~13-18 dB SNR improvement with 8ms latency on Moto G32, APK reduced from 63MB to ~6MB.
